text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I pass by a takoyaki stand while I'm<n>out
shopping, when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Craving a quick snack?! You look like<n>you're
hankering for something good!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've got just the thing for<n>you—takoyaki!
Don't you worry,<n>they're masterfully made with
my<n>acupuncturing skills! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With practiced hands, she quickly<n>whips up some
takoyaki, filling the air<n>with a mouthwatering
scent.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait for just the right moment<n>annnd... poke! ☆
Heavens, just look at<n>that color, that luster!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
See, they're absolutely irresistible! ☆<n>
Acupuncture truly is applicable to<n>anything and
everything!
choice_data_list:
What does takoyaki have to do with 
acupuncture?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Both cooking and medical treatment<n>require a
similar level of care! (I think.)<n>How wonderful that
I can hone my art<n>while earning an extra buck on
the<n>side!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The days I spent flipping takoyaki<n>while
frantically dodging hot oil...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And that one time I got yelled at for<n>burning a
whole batch... Why, those<n>days are well behind
me!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Come now—have a taste of the fruit<n>of my labors!
☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I accept the piping hot takoyaki, pop<n>one in my
mouth... and the harmonious<n>combination of
chewy dough and<n>octopus fills my senses!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like it was to your liking.It was worth using my needles, then.No worries, I used the ones I keepexclusively for making takoyaki!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna churn out more while I'm<n>still in the
groove! Woohoo, mass<n>production! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Her needle technique is exquisite...Maybe she can be trusted afterall... Maybe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I accept the piping hot takoyaki, pop<n>one in my
mouth... and am immediately<n>disappointed. There
doesn't seem to<n>be any octopus inside.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no way... Don't tell me I forgot<n>to put
octopus in this whole batch?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sasami Anshinzawa gets an earful<n>from the stall
owner afterwards.
